commands.review_summary:
Adds `first-output` and `completed` phases to the gateway `chat.send_timing` event by storing per-run send timestamps and emitting timing from agent delta/final handling.

PR surface: Source +91, Tests +2. Total +93 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: the PR diff directly shows broad `broadcast` delivery and identical received-time bases for both timing fields, while current source and tests show targeted origin-connection timing semantics. I did not run a live gateway because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs author/maintainer follow-up for event-routing fixes and real behavior proof rather than an automated cleanup close.
